message:
feat(supervision): add pattern persistence module with lifecycle management

Implements signature library persistence and versioning (bead process_triage-9uqy):
- PatternLibrary manager for loading/saving patterns from ~/.config/process_triage/patterns/
- Pattern lifecycle states: New → Learning → Stable → Deprecated → Removed
- PatternSource tracking: BuiltIn, Learned, Custom, Community, Imported
- Statistics tracking with Laplace smoothing for confidence computation
- Import/export with conflict resolution strategies
- Disabled patterns management
- Schema migration support

Also fixes missing require_human_for_supervised field in pt-core RobotMode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
